_meta.purpose: 反刍治本 (Sir 2026-06-02): concern severity 自我强化环 + 不遗忘 + snooze 漏电 三修的配置. 详 jarvis_soul_reflector.py / jarvis_concerns.py / docs/JARVIS_VOICE_AND_MIND_REFACTOR.md §3.2.

fields.scan_jarvis_reply: Fix1: reflect_turn 是否扫贾维斯自己回复 (false=只扫 Sir 真说的, 斩自我强化环)
fields.severity_decay_enabled: Fix2: 是否启用 severity 时间半衰期
fields.severity_half_life_days: Fix2: 半衰期天数 (N 天没真 Sir signal → severity 砍半)
fields.severity_decay_grace_days: Fix2: 宽限期 (最后 Sir signal 后 N 天内不衰)
fields.severity_decay_floor: Fix2: 衰减下限 (0=可衰到自然过期)
